issues_found: Published_at in record is '2017-01-01' but source metadata shows original publication in January 2017 with revision in August 2017. The August 2017 date should be used as it represents the final version.
Source text is an abstract/summary only. Full methodology, data details, and policy implications cannot be verified against the complete paper.
The source explicitly states 'Available only in PDF', limiting verification depth.
human_review_reason: Record is well-constructed and accurate to the available source material, but is limited to abstract-only content. The August 2017 publication date should be corrected. Human review needed to assess whether historical research from 2017 on mortgage intermediation costs remains relevant to current market structure discussions, and whether the record's policy implications (QE attenuation) are appropriately calibrated.
